resolved_findings: Normal plugin no longer contains roundtable UI, state, messages, bridges, scripts, localhost wildcards, or roundtable build output.
Roundtable default lifecycle no longer constructs or binds plugin ports 3006 and 3017.
Local-core contains no product path, HTTP server, browser API, UI, fixed product port, or product state.
The stale worktree registration was pruned without deleting codex/new-plugin-rewrite refs.
Launcher test pipe inheritance was removed; the lifecycle chain is bounded below the 90-second gate.
ADworkflo task, plan, worker, verification, review, and impact records now describe the same isolation task.

host_findings.evidence: 42 remaining taskkill.exe processes shared parent PID 3696, ChatGPT.exe; repository sources contain no taskkill invocation.
host_findings.action: Do not terminate user desktop host processes from the product launcher.

residual_risks: Provider DOM and login/verification flows remain externally controlled.
Real extension loading and real provider turns require user-controlled browser state and were not automated.
